currentStep.title: Explain Which Part of the Factorization Matters
currentStep.openingLine: Let's name which part of the factorization matters before solving the transfer question.
currentStep.firstTutorQuestion: Which part of the factorization helps you answer this question first?
currentStep.smallHint: Do not use the whole factorization blindly; point to the part that matters here and say why it matters.
currentStep.goodStoppingPoint: Learner identifies the relevant part of the factorization before using it and explains why that part answers the transfer question.
